faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about CreovaLab

items.a: CreovaLab is an AI-powered workspace designed specifically for faceless content creators. It combines all the tools you need to create professional content - from AI script generation to final video export - all in one seamless platform.

items.q: Is there a free plan available?
items.a: Yes! Start with our free Starter plan that includes 5 scripts per month, basic TTS voices, and auto subtitles. No credit card required. Upgrade anytime when you need more.

items.q: Can I use this for YouTube Automation?
items.a: Absolutely! CreovaLab is built for YouTube automation channels, faceless TikTok accounts, Instagram reels, Facebook reels, and any platform where you create content without showing your face.

items.q: How accurate are the auto-generated subtitles?
items.a: Our AI subtitle generator achieves 95%+ accuracy with proper timing synchronization. It supports multiple languages and can handle various accents and speech patterns.

items.q: What voices are available for Text to Speech?
items.a: We offer 8 premium AI voices including Female Soft, Female Natural, Female Story, Female Energetic, Male Deep, Male Natural, Male Story, and Male Documentary. Each voice can be previewed before generation.

items.q: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
items.a: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access to your plan features until the end of your billing period. Your data will be preserved.
